Terms

Last updated June 2026

These terms cover use of the Kitchen Websites website and its tools (the Google Scorecard, and the booking and contact forms). Using the site means you’re okay with them.

The tools are estimates

The Google Scorecard reads public Google data and gives you a directional snapshot, not the last word on your business. It’s meant to point you at where to look, not to guarantee an outcome.

Service terms live with each engagement

The Handshake Terms (month to month, you own everything, cancel any month) and every offer’s specific guarantee and conditions are stated in full on each offer page and in your agreement. Those govern the actual work.

Contact

Questions: shane@kitchenwebsites.com.
